EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" created protected object "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" changed protected object "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" deleted protected object "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" exported protected object "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" imported protected object "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
